title: Application Authentication Brute Force
description: Detects brute force login attempts against CRM Portal and Drone Shop by monitoring failed authentication events. Correlates with WAF signals and rate limiting events.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and ('security.attack.type' in ('broken_auth', 'rate_limit_bypass', 'brute_force') or message like '%login failed%' or message like '%auth failure%') | stats count as Attempts, distinctcount('security.username') as UniqueUsers by 'security.source_ip', 'service.name' | where Attempts > 5 | sort -Attempts
